requirement_topic.en: Local Importer / Authorised Representative Requirement (ANRCETI Registration)
requirement_topic.zh: 本地进口商/授权代表要求（ANRCETI注册）
requirement_topic.zht: 本地進口商/授權代表要求（ANRCETI登記）

summary.en: Wireless devices (radio equipment) imported into Moldova must have an importer or authorised representative legally established in Moldova. This entity is responsible for registering the radio equipment with ANRCETI, holding the DS and technical file, affixing the required conformity marking, and being the primary contact for ATIC market surveillance. The importer or authorised representative must be identifiable on the product label or accompanying documentation. For radio equipment, registration with ANRCETI may require submission of technical parameters, frequency bands, and EIRP data.
summary.zh: 进口至摩尔多瓦的无线设备（无线电设备）须有在摩尔多瓦合法设立的进口商或授权代表。该主体负责向ANRCETI登记无线电设备、持有DS及技术文件、加贴所需符合性标志，并作为ATIC市场监督的主要联络方。进口商或授权代表的信息须在产品标签或附属文件上可识别。对于无线电设备，向ANRCETI登记可能需要提交技术参数、频率频段及EIRP数据。
summary.zht: 進口至摩爾多瓦的無線裝置（無線電設備）須有在摩爾多瓦合法設立的進口商或授權代表。該主體負責向ANRCETI登記無線電設備、持有DS及技術文件、加貼所需符合性標誌，並作為ATIC市場監督的主要聯絡方。進口商或授權代表的資訊須在產品標籤或附屬文件上可識別。對於無線電設備，向ANRCETI登記可能需要提交技術參數、頻率頻段及EIRP資料。

standards_or_laws: Law 235/2011 on technical regulations (Republic of Moldova) — importer and authorised representative obligations
Law 7/2016 on market surveillance (Republic of Moldova)
ANRCETI — Agenția Națională pentru Reglementare în Comunicații Electronice și Tehnologia Informației

summary.en: In China, wireless devices must be listed under a MIIT Network Access License (NAL). The NAL holder is typically the Chinese manufacturer or an entity registered in China. For imported devices, the importer assumes the NAL holder role. There is no equivalent 'authorised representative in China' concept for foreign manufacturers — the Chinese importer entity holds the NAL. SRRC radio type approval is linked to the NAL applicant entity.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线设备须列入MIIT网络接入许可（NAL）。NAL持有方通常为中国制造商或在中国注册的实体。对于进口设备，进口商承担NAL持有方角色。对于外国制造商，不存在对等的"在华授权代表"概念——中国进口商实体持有NAL。SRRC无线电型式核准与NAL申请方实体挂钩。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線裝置須列入MIIT網路接取許可（NAL）。NAL持有方通常為中國製造商或在中國登記的實體。對於進口設備，進口商承擔NAL持有方角色。對於外國製造商，不存在對等的「在華授權代表」概念——中國進口商實體持有NAL。SRRC無線電型式核准與NAL申請方實體掛鉤。

standards_or_laws: MIIT Network Access License (NAL) — holder must be a China-registered entity
SRRC radio type approval — applicant must be a China-registered entity

gap.en: A Chinese manufacturer or exporter cannot self-declare conformity or hold the Moldovan DS directly — a legally-established Moldovan importer or authorised representative is required. This entity must register radio equipment with ANRCETI and maintain conformity documentation in Moldovan or Russian. The Chinese MIIT NAL and SRRC registration do not satisfy this obligation. Establishing a Moldovan commercial relationship with an importer or local representative is a prerequisite for market entry.
gap.zh: 中国制造商或出口商不能自行声明符合性或直接持有摩尔多瓦DS——须有在摩尔多瓦合法设立的进口商或授权代表。该主体须向ANRCETI登记无线电设备，并以摩尔多瓦语或俄语保存符合性文件。中国MIIT NAL和SRRC登记不能满足此义务。与摩尔多瓦进口商或本地代表建立商业关系是进入市场的前提条件。
gap.zht: 中國製造商或出口商不能自行聲明符合性或直接持有摩爾多瓦DS——須有在摩爾多瓦合法設立的進口商或授權代表。該主體須向ANRCETI登記無線電設備，並以摩爾多瓦語或俄語保存符合性文件。中國MIIT NAL和SRRC登記不能滿足此義務。與摩爾多瓦進口商或本地代表建立商業關係是進入市場的前提條件。

source.publisher: ANRCETI (National Regulatory Agency for Electronic Communications and Information Technology, Republic of Moldova)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A legally-established Moldovan importer or authorised representative is mandatory for wireless device market entry. Chinese manufacturer credentials (SRRC, NAL, CCC) do not fulfil this requirement. The Moldovan entity must register radio equipment with ANRCETI, hold the DS and technical file, and be identified on product labelling. This commercial and legal relationship must be established before first shipment to Moldova.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在摩尔多瓦合法设立的进口商或授权代表是无线设备进入市场的强制要求。中国制造商资质（SRRC、NAL、CCC）不能满足此要求。摩尔多瓦主体须向ANRCETI登记无线电设备、持有DS及技术文件，并在产品标签上标明。首次向摩尔多瓦发货前须建立此商业及法律关系。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在摩爾多瓦合法設立的進口商或授權代表是無線裝置進入市場的強制要求。中國製造商資質（SRRC、NAL、CCC）不能滿足此要求。摩爾多瓦主體須向ANRCETI登記無線電設備、持有DS及技術文件，並在產品標籤上標明。首次向摩爾多瓦發貨前須建立此商業及法律關係。
